OpenClaw Studio (Agent OS): One Dashboard for Images, Video, Voice, Apps + Infinite Memory

The script introduces OpenClaw Studio inside an Agent Operating System, positioning it as a free, customizable dashboard that turns OpenClaw from a basic chat into a “studio” where outputs never get lost. It demonstrates built-in Twitter search (with a markdown previewer), image generation, video generation with format and resolution options, text-to-speech with selectable voices, and real-time voice conversations with an AI agent, plus a workspace that previews and organizes everything created (images, videos, voice notes, apps, websites) with local folders and download access. A control room shows agents, logs, scheduled tasks, and memory. The key missing piece for most users is a memory system, implemented via OpenClaw + Obsidian and an “infinite context engine” that logs work and improves results. The creator offers prompts, tutorials, zip files, and updates via the AI Profit Boardroom community.

OpenClaw 5.24 Beta: Discord Meeting Notes, iMessage Approvals, Live Voice Steering + Token-Saving Images

OpenClaw 5.24 is a GitHub pre-release beta with new features including a meeting notes plugin that lets an agent join Discord voice calls, capture who said what, auto-start recording, and provide transcripts for summaries, action items, and search. The update adds iMessage action approvals via thumbs up/down, more interactive voice conversations with real-time status checks, cancel/redirect/queue controls, and Discord wake-name gating. Images now auto-adjust quality/compression by model with override modes to save tokens, and gateway startup is faster by reusing persistent data. Dashboard chat search is improved, the install package is smaller, and Grok web search moves to OAuth login rather than separate API keys. Fixes include Telegram topic concurrency, follow-up cancel-signal issues, Claude image support detection, DeepSeek tool cleanup, faster non-blocking memory search, and quicker skill refresh/updates. The script warns not to deploy beta on live setups and outlines backup, beta update, testing, and rollback steps.

videos.title: Avalanche Collapse in Game 3, On the Verge of a Season Ending Sweep by Vegas
videos.summary_source_text:
Avalanche Collapse in Game 3, On the Verge of a Season Ending Sweep by Vegas Colorado Avalanche collapse as Vegas Golden Knights seize control; has hope for a comeback faded in Denver?

Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down the Avalanche’s stunning implosion after blowing a 3-0 lead and falling behind 3-0 in the series. The hosts spotlight glaring defensive lapses, Scott Wedgwood’s goaltending struggles, and the lackluster performance from key players like Brock Nelson and Valeri Nichushkin. They question whether Nathan MacKinnon’s injury will sideline him and debate if a switch to Mackenzie Blackwood in net could spark anything for Colorado.

The conversation explores the Golden Knights’ relentless attack, effective shot blocking, and why Vegas’ confidence outclasses Colorado’s intensity. As the Avalanche’s season teeters on the brink, the hosts wonder if there’s any resolve left or if a sweep is inevitable. Can the Avalanche rediscover their third-period magic, or is it time to plan for the offseason? Don’t miss this raw assessment of a championship contender on the ropes.

The Swedish forward later adds an assist on the empty-net goal as Vegas secures a 5-3 win to take a commanding 3-0 series lead.

videos.title: Caruso wasn’t having it 😭

videos.title: FLYING HIGH! Carolina Hurricanes Even Series After Nikolaj Ehlers' OT Winner in Game 2!
videos.summary_source_text:
FLYING HIGH! Carolina Hurricanes Even Series After Nikolaj Ehlers' OT Winner in Game 2! The Carolina Hurricanes tied the Eastern Conference Final by winning Game 2 Saturday night, 3-2 in overtime! What a game from Nikolaj Ehlers, who was the hero with the overtime game-winning goal. What stood out in the win, and how can the Hurricanes take a 2-1 series lead on Monday night's Game 3? On the Monday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on the Hurricanes' Game 2 win in overtime, which seems to be the norm with three straight wins in overtime in the second game of a series. More importantly, how clutch was Ehlers in the win, scoring two goals to lead the way? Also, Eric Robinson is feeling it with two goals in two games to bring the scoring depth. Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on how the Hurricanes played a much better Game 2 compared to their Game 1 loss on Thursday night. It was a night-and-day difference for the Hurricanes as they split the first two games at home. Finally, Zach concludes the show by previewing Monday night's Game 3 in Montreal. Now that the series shifts to the Bell Centre, what do the Hurricanes need to do to take a 2-1 series lead? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: Wyndham Clark Shoots Final Round 60 to Win | Round 4 Highlights | THE CJ CUP | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
Wyndham Clark Shoots Final Round 60 to Win | Round 4 Highlights | THE CJ CUP | 2026 Wyndham Clark shot a final round 60, including a back-nine 28, to win the 2026 CJ CUP Byron Nelson by three strokes over Si Woo Kim. It is Clark's fourth win on the PGA TOUR and first since 2024.

The PGA TOUR returns to Texas for the 2026 THE CJ CUP Byron Nelson at TPC Craig Ranch, with hometown hero and defending champion Scottie Scheffler leading the field after his historic eight-shot victory last year. Dallas natives Jordan Spieth and Si Woo Kim also return to a redesigned TPC Craig Ranch, while major champion Brooks Koepka headlines another strong Texas field alongside rising local star Pierceson Coody. This year marks the debut of a renovated course overseen by World Golf Hall of Famer Lanny Wadkins, with longer holes, rebuilt greens and repositioned bunkers set to provide a tougher test. The tournament also continues its Mental Health Awareness Month initiatives, highlighted by the annual “Green Out” celebration and charitable efforts surrounding the iconic par-3 17th hole, “The Ranch.” With FedExCup points, Signature Event positioning and momentum heading into the PGA Championship all on the line, another exciting week awaits in Texas.

videos.title: PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 4 | THE CJ CUP | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 4 | THE CJ CUP | 2026 Check out the best shots of the day from Round 4 of the 2026 THE CJ CUP Byron Nelson, featuring Wyndham Clark, Si Woo Kim, Scottie Scheffler, and Jackson Suber.

The PGA TOUR returns to Texas for the 2026 THE CJ CUP Byron Nelson at TPC Craig Ranch, with hometown hero and defending champion Scottie Scheffler leading the field after his historic eight-shot victory last year. Dallas natives Jordan Spieth and Si Woo Kim also return to a redesigned TPC Craig Ranch, while major champion Brooks Koepka headlines another strong Texas field alongside rising local star Pierceson Coody. This year marks the debut of a renovated course overseen by World Golf Hall of Famer Lanny Wadkins, with longer holes, rebuilt greens and repositioned bunkers set to provide a tougher test. The tournament also continues its Mental Health Awareness Month initiatives, highlighted by the annual “Green Out” celebration and charitable efforts surrounding the iconic par-3 17th hole, “The Ranch.” With FedExCup points, Signature Event positioning and momentum heading into the PGA Championship all on the line, another exciting week awaits in Texas.

SUBSCRIBE TO THE PGA TOUR: https://www.youtube.com/@UCKwGZZMrhNYKzucCtTPY2Nw

videos.title: Film Study: How Azzi Fudd Is HEATING UP With The Dallas Wings
videos.summary_source_text: Film Study: How Azzi Fudd Is HEATING UP With The Dallas Wings Dallas Wings No. 1 overall pick Azzi Fudd is beginning to heat up for her new team after a relatively slow start to her rookie campaign. The DLLS Wings crew discusses how the offense - specifically center Jess Shepard - is adapting to playing with such an excellent shooter, and how the mere threat of Fudd on the floor could strike fear in the heart of defenses around the WNBA. Live Fitting! HUGE Change For This Tour Player! Live Fitting! HUGE Change For This Tour Player!

Skyler Finnell is our in house Grass League pro, a former PGA Latin America player & NOW a resident teacher at The Trott Shop.

Book a lesson with Skyler here: https://pages.thetrott.shop/coaching-booking-price

In this upload we reference a lot about club build and swing weight, this video could well be a useful resource: https://youtu.be/SzJafDhdHzQ?si=1c3oUSldovnSB9is

The Jumbo Max guys were back in town and Skyler was interested to learn more. This is a grip fitting with a top player as your example.

Take note of his delivery numbers and how Jumbo Max choose to go counter balanced in order to change the apex and miss tendency. 

Learn more at https://jumbomax.com/ - Grip Fitting is a thing!

videos.title: Google Gemini Spark - The OpenClaw KILLER?
videos.summary_source_text:
Google Gemini Spark - The OpenClaw KILLER? Google's new Gemini Spark - the OpenClaw KILLER? 🤔

Google just announced Gemini Spark, their 24/7 personal AI agent.

Sound familiar? It's similar to OpenClaw or Hermes Agent, but with a twist - it runs in the cloud, so no Mac mini needed 🖥️

It plugs straight into all your Google services natively, supports MCP for 3rd-party integrations, and has Antigravity harness built-in for coding and Chrome control.

The catch? You can't pick your model - it's Gemini 3.5 Flash only. But here's the thing: 3.5 Flash competes with Opus 4.7 at a THIRD of the cost 🤯

Will you be trying Gemini Spark? Comment SPARK if you will 👇

via @Google / @GoogleUK

videos.title: What Your Eyebrows May Be Trying to Tell You | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
What Your Eyebrows May Be Trying to Tell You | Dr. Mandell Are your eyebrows getting thinner, especially toward the outer edges? Most people assume it’s just aging, but your eyebrows can sometimes reflect deeper changes happening inside the body. In this video, Dr. Mandell explains how thyroid function, iron levels, zinc, protein intake, chronic stress, hormonal shifts, poor nutrient absorption, and even inflammation may contribute to eyebrow thinning. Plus, a simple interactive stress-relief technique you can do with me to help calm the nervous system and support healthy circulation. Your body often leaves clues before bigger symptoms appear. Learn what your eyebrows may be trying to tell you.

videos.title: Round 4 Highlights | 2026 Soudal Open
videos.summary_source_text:
Round 4 Highlights | 2026 Soudal Open See the highlights from the final round of the 2026 Soudal Open at Rinkven International Golf Club in Belgium. The final day delivered plenty of drama with a packed leaderboard throughout the afternoon. Richard Sterne came from five shots back to claim victory, while the overnight leader dropped three shots to open the door for the chasing pack.

► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

After a break for the US PGA Championship last week, the European Swing resumes with the second of six events across the continent and the first of five consecutive national opens on the DP World Tour schedule as the Tour returns to Belgium for the Soudal Open. While this event can trace its roots back well over 100 years, this week sees the 20th time it has been part of the DP World Tour schedule. First played in 1910 and won by 1907 Open champion Arnaud Massy, it would be played every year until 1958 barring breaks for the two World Wars. Local star Thomas Detry is likely to be the headline act this week as he, almost unbelievably, searches for his first DP World Tour win after five runner-up finishes.

Welcome to the Official YouTube channel of the DP World Tour. Every week you can find extended tournament highlights and individual player highlights from the likes of Rory McIlroy, Justin Rose and Tommy Fleetwood. This is also the home of the 14 Club Challenge, Little Interviews, Fastest Hole and many more challenges, pranks and world record attempts featuring the biggest golfers in the world.

videos.title: Would The Mavericks Drafting Aday Mara Signal The End Of One Of Their Centers' Time In Dallas?
videos.summary_source_text: Would The Mavericks Drafting Aday Mara Signal The End Of One Of Their Centers' Time In Dallas? Aday Mara has seemingly shot up draft boards after the combine, with some pegging him as a top-10 pick. His defensive prowess, passing ability and size has intriguing potential for any team, but with the Mavericks already having Dereck Lively II and Daniel Gafford on their roster- is there any chance they'd use a top-10 pick on another center? And, in the scenario that they do, would that mean they're moving on from Lively II or Gafford? We discuss those questions, evaluate Mara as a prospect and dive in to his potential fit as a Maverick. videos.title: More Speed In Hockey: Horizontal Reaction Forces
videos.summary_source_text:
More Speed In Hockey: Horizontal Reaction Forces In hockey, speed is about how you generate ground reaction forces. While basketball players rely heavily on vertical forces to jump and explode upward, hockey players need to maximize their ability to create horizontal forces into the ice.

This video breaks down the physics behind shin angle and how adjusting your knee position can unlock more horizontal force and velocity. The key difference between hockey and basketball comes down to which direction you’re pushing.

Follow for more kinesiology and mechanics breakdowns on what separates NHL’s best from the rest. In hockey, speed is about how you generate ground reaction forces. videos.title: Is Google Search Officially Dead?
videos.summary_source_text:
Is Google Search Officially Dead? Is the OG Google search officially dead? 💀

At Google I/O, they announced that the tech giant is essentially replacing traditional search with an AI engine. It's not the most surprising move, but it has been very controversial.

By pushing AI overviews to the top of search and scraping info from blogs and videos to give you AI answers, Google is actively keeping people from clicking into organic websites that rely on that traffic to stay alive.

Not only can that jeopardize many small creators, but it also begs the question: if those creators lose their traffic and stop making content... what is the AI going to pull its answers from? 

#Ai #AInews #googleIO #gemini #contentcreation Is the OG Google search officially dead? 💀

Why Processed Food Feels Impossible to Resist Changing eating habits is not just about learning what foods are healthy. Most people already know what they should avoid, yet still feel pulled toward the same behaviors over and over again. The real challenge is learning how to stop reacting automatically to every craving and impulse. Creating moments of silence and awareness helps build the ability to pause, regain control, and make choices intentionally instead of emotionally.

videos.title: Amortera inte på ditt hus, det kan faktiskt höja din risk.
videos.summary_source_text:
Amortera inte på ditt hus, det kan faktiskt höja din risk. Amortera inte på ditt hus. Det kan faktiskt höja din risk.

Det här är en av sakerna ni i communityn fick mig att ändra åsikt om. Jag är uppvuxen med "den som är satt i skuld är icke fri" — amortera, gör rätt för dig. Men skrapar man på ytan så stämmer det inte riktigt.

Tänk på den rike fattigpensionären. Tant Agda har gjort allt rätt, amorterat hela livet och äger ett obelånat hus på fyra miljoner. Men pensionen är låg, så hon lever från månad till månad. Hade hon istället lånat en miljon på huset innan pensionen kunde hon toppat upp ekonomin och fått ett rikare pensionsliv. Efter pensionen är det för sent — då säger banken nej.

Min slutsats idag: följ amorteringskravet, men överamortera inte. Har du en stabil ekonomi och inte konsumerar upp pengarna är det helt okej att ligga kvar på 50 procents belåningsgrad.

Är amortering alltid bra, eller håller du med? Skriv i kommentarerna 👇

videos.summary_source_text:
Takomo 2026 Fairway Woods - Full Review Rick Shiels puts the Takomo Ignis D1 Fairway Woods to the test — and these budget fairway woods are turning heads. Available in 3, 5, and 7 wood, the Ignis FW line is built to be easy to hit— all at a price point that undercuts the big OEM names. But does the performance match the premium look?


Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

To cut through the hype.

videos.title: How McDavid Gets That Crazy Lean on Crossunders (6 Practical Tips)
videos.summary_source_text:
How McDavid Gets That Crazy Lean on Crossunders (6 Practical Tips) How McDavid Gets That Crazy Lean on Crossunders (6 Practical Tips) 

In Part 1 we broke down the theory of lean what it actually is and how it works. But theory only goes so far. This is the part where we improve on it.

In this video I walk through 6 practical tips for unlocking McDavid-level lean on your crossunders, plus two drills to put it into practice immediately.

What's covered:
1) The mindset shift from leaning to falling (the most important one).
2) Why you should plant your feet toward the boards, not under your body.
3) Keeping your feet narrow for max lean inside edge next to outside edge.
4) Heel pressure on both edges for grip and tighter turns.
5) Posture and the Crosby crevice: why hand position is the difference between true lean and artificial lean.
6) Wearing full equipment so your subconscious will actually let you commit.
7) Drill 1: The ankle collapse auxiliary for priming your outside edge.
8) Drill 2: The max lean drill from Kevin at Valley Apex Training.

The big idea: lean isn't something you hold it's something you fall into. Once that clicks, everything else gets easier.
_______________

videos.title: Feeling Your Putter Wobble? Do This #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Feeling Your Putter Wobble? Do This #golfswing #golftips Does your putter feel wobbly or unsteady on the way back? The problem isn’t your stroke — it’s trying to control it too much. By loosening your grip pressure and allowing a quicker  backstroke, you’ll actually create a smoother, more natural roll. As Dr. Bob Rotella says: “You gain control when you give up control.” Try this next time you’re on the greens and watch your putting improve.

videos.title: Can You Really Use Your Ear to Predict a Heart Attack?
videos.summary_source_text:
Can You Really Use Your Ear to Predict a Heart Attack? Did you know a small crease on your earlobe could be a warning sign of heart problems?

🌟 Which of the 10 health signals are you missing? Take the 2-minute quiz to discover your #1 Health Lever: https://drbrg.co/4wjsRCK

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

There’s a little-known physical marker called Frank’s sign, a diagonal crease that runs across the earlobe at about a 45° angle. Studies have shown that it appears in a large percentage of people with coronary heart disease, yet most people have never heard of it.

Awareness is everything. Catching early warning signs gives you the opportunity to take action before more serious problems develop.

videos.title: What Ozempic is Doing to Your Liver
videos.summary_source_text:
What Ozempic is Doing to Your Liver Most people are never told about the connection between Ozempic and liver damage. Discover the hidden Ozempic side effects that can affect liver health, gut health, and the gallbladder, and what you can do to minimize Ozempic’s risks.

🌟10 biological signals control how you feel every day, but only 1 matters most for YOUR body. Take the free 2-minute quiz to find out: https://drbrg.co/4o3KBP3

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

0:00 Introduction: Ozempic dangers
0:58 Does Ozempic improve liver inflammation?
2:30 Daniel Drucker and GLP-1
4:12 Ozempic liver damage
5:25 Ozempic and gallbladder disease 
6:29 GLP-1 drugs vs. natural GLP-1
8:07 Ozempic side effects
9:34 How to minimize Ozempic risks 

Keep watching to learn more about Ozempic and the best ways to support your liver and gallbladder naturally:
▶️ https://youtu.be/E8CaBsGkRm4
▶️ https://youtu.be/F84ijY7Iofg
▶️ https://youtu.be/iIZZzzKnCE8

Some studies have shown that Ozempic may improve liver health, but it’s also been documented to cause severe liver problems in a very short period of time.

The ESSENCE trial followed 800 patients with liver inflammation and metabolic dysfunction and found that 63% experienced complete resolution of liver inflammation after taking Ozempic for 72 weeks. Another 37% showed measurable improvement in liver fibrosis.

Most people taking Ozempic are using it for weight loss, not for liver inflammation or fibrosis.
In one reported case, a woman started Ozempic after bariatric surgery and ended up hospitalized just 2 weeks later with severely elevated liver enzymes similar to acute liver failure.

Hepatotoxicity is not currently listed as a common Ozempic side effect, which means liver damage may sometimes be overlooked. Symptoms such as fatigue, mild abdominal discomfort, or loss of appetite may be dismissed as normal side effects rather than possible signs of liver stress.

The gut, liver, and gallbladder were not designed to be constantly stimulated by GLP-1. Naturally, GLP-1 increases for a short time after eating, but GLP-1 drugs can stimulate this pathway continuously for up to 7 days.

While Ozempic may lead to weight loss, some of that weight may come from lean body mass and bone density rather than fat. It also does not address the root cause of insulin resistance. Most people ultimately regain two-thirds of what they lost when they quit using Ozempic.

videos.title: Wedge Launch Angle drill to spin your wedges
videos.summary_source_text:
Wedge Launch Angle drill to spin your wedges Now, the point here is to keep the ball under the top of the stick. As usual, when you pull this off, you'll be shocked at just how low pros actually launch the wedges. My in depth research shows this is the height that gives you the optimal chance to consistently put a ton of spin on the ball. There's a number of ways to use two bricks together, but one of my favorite ways because this is really what I'm struggling with is getting that good forward shaft lean with the wedge.

Filips Honey Chipotle Chicken Wrap
20min 
 Ca 4p

Ingredienser:

Marinad:
Kyckling:
 800g kycklingbröst, skuret i mindre bitar
2msk chipotle paste eller 1msk chipotle krydda pulver
1.5 dl grekisk yoghurt
 2 msk honung
 1 tsk salt

Chipotle kräm:
3dl grekisk yogurt 
50g chipotle paste eller 1msk chipotlepulver 
½ lime, juice
2rivna vitlöksklyftor
salt

Till wraps:
 4 stora tortillabröd
 1 romansallad, strimlad
 1 röd paprika eller tomat, tärnad
 1 rödlök, finhackad
½ lime juice
Salt
1mks honung
2dl  Mozzarella, riven



Gör såhär:
Mixa ihop alla ingredienser till marinaden, Lägg kycklingen i en skål, häll på marinaden och blanda ordentligt.
Hetta upp  rapsolja i en stekpanna på medelhög värme. Stek kycklingen tills den är genomstekt, ca 8-10 min.
Blanda sallad, paprika och rödlök i en skål. Gå i med honung, salt och limejuice.
Lägg ut ett tortillabröd, bre på chipotle krämen, toppa med mozzarella, salladsmix och kyckling. Ringla över lite extra sås.
Vik ihop till en wrap. njut! Detta är serien Wrap attack serien där vi testar wraps!

videos.title: Summer wishes for Nikola Jokic, Jamal Murray, and Aaron Gordon | Serbian Corner
videos.summary_source_text:
Summer wishes for Nikola Jokic, Jamal Murray, and Aaron Gordon | Serbian Corner The third week of the Nuggets' offseason is behind us, and the Conference Finals are in full swing. We did learn that Nikola Jokic will be playing in the FIBA World Cup qualifying games this July and August, so at least something will make the long, long offseason a bit more eventful.
Gordon Gross of the Denver Stiffs joins Miroslav to discuss his overarching takeaways from the season behind us and looks ahead at what awaits the team in early July. 
The two friends then talk about the key phrase of the offseason - complacency, and who to put it on, the right way to build this team going forward, before playing a game of "Would you rather" and making their summer wishes for the Big 3 - Nikola Jokic, Jamal Murray, and Aaron Gordon.

videos.title: Vi sålde slut på ALLT – inside Stockholm Burger Fest 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
Vi sålde slut på ALLT – inside Stockholm Burger Fest 2026 📖 Köp vår bok: https://www.adlibris.com/sv/bok/burgare-sa-gor-du-varldens-basta-burgare-hemma-9789127191211

Stockholm levererade. Tre dagar, fullt tryck från öppning till stängning och en publik som åt sig igenom hela menyn. Stockholm Burger Fest 2026 är över! Och ja, vi sålde slut på alla 14 000 burgare.

Festivalen firade 10 år och hölls mitt i stan på Smålandstorget, precis vid Barrels City. Under helgen tog vi hit tre av världens mest omtalade burgaraktörer, som kom med egna team, råvaror och menyer och levererade precis så hårt som man hoppats.

Från Spanien kom Hundred Burgers, som tagit hem titeln världens bästa burgare tre år i rad. Deras “Satisfaction” gjorde ingen besviken med 60 dagar hängmörat Rubia Gallega-kött, bacon, ost och rökig majonnäs i ett fluffigt milk bun. En av de mest snackade burgarna under hela helgen.

England representerades av MeatCastles, som gjorde sitt första Sverigebesök. Deras MOAB (Mother of All Burgers) levde upp till namnet – vulkansmashat kött, cheddar, baconsylt och gochujangmajonnäs. Maxade smaker och långa köer hela dagarna.

Från USA gästades festivalen av Alvin Cailan, känd från The Burger Show och Amboy i Los Angeles. Med sitt koncept Burgers by Alvin Cailan serverade han “Thin and Crispy”, som innehöll smashat hängmörat kött, karamelliserad lök, rå lök och en riktigt djup umamiburgardressing i nybakat sesambröd.

Bakom festivalen står vi på Burgerdudes och Barrels Burgers & Beer, med Heinz som huvudsponsor.

Stort tack till alla som kom, köade, åt och gjorde det här till en av de bästa upplagorna hittills. Vi ses på vårt nästa burgarevent. Och tack till våra sponsorer Heinz, Coca-Cola, McCain och Tasty!

videos.title: Dobes STICKS with it in crazy moment! 🇨🇿🏒😵‍💫
videos.summary_source_text:
Dobes STICKS with it in crazy moment! 🇨🇿🏒😵‍💫 Well, you don't see that every day! Canadiens' goaltender Jakub Dobes goes to play the puck behind his own net early in the 2nd period, when suddenly the Hurricanes' William Carrier somehow gets his stick stuck in Dobes' pad! Dobes displays some impressive STICK-to-itiveness and makes a huge save right after getting back to his crease.

videos.title: 23.5: Ehlers WINS Game 2 for Hurricanes! 🇩🇰🔥
videos.summary_source_text:
23.5: Ehlers WINS Game 2 for Hurricanes! 🇩🇰🔥 Nikolaj Ehlers delivers a massive performance with two goals in Game 2 of the Eastern Conference Final, leading the Carolina Hurricanes to a 3-2 overtime win over the Montreal Canadiens! The Danish forward gives Carolina the 2-1 lead in the second period before scoring again just three minutes into overtime to seal the victory. A much-needed win for the Hurricanes as they tie the series 1-1 heading to Montreal.

videos.title: PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 3 | THE CJ CUP | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 3 | THE CJ CUP | 2026 Check out the best shots of the day from Round 3 of the 2026 THE CJ CUP Byron Nelson, featuring Si Woo Kim, Wyndham Clark, Scottie Scheffler, and Sungjae Im, among others.

The PGA TOUR returns to Texas for the 2026 THE CJ CUP Byron Nelson at TPC Craig Ranch, with hometown hero and defending champion Scottie Scheffler leading the field after his historic eight-shot victory last year. Dallas natives Jordan Spieth and Si Woo Kim also return to a redesigned TPC Craig Ranch, while major champion Brooks Koepka headlines another strong Texas field alongside rising local star Pierceson Coody. This year marks the debut of a renovated course overseen by World Golf Hall of Famer Lanny Wadkins, with longer holes, rebuilt greens and repositioned bunkers set to provide a tougher test. The tournament also continues its Mental Health Awareness Month initiatives, highlighted by the annual “Green Out” celebration and charitable efforts surrounding the iconic par-3 17th hole, “The Ranch.” With FedExCup points, Signature Event positioning and momentum heading into the PGA Championship all on the line, another exciting week awaits in Texas.

videos.title: Mistakes That Led to Colorado BLOWING Their First 3rd Period Lead in Game 2 vs Vegas | Film Room
videos.summary_source_text:
Mistakes That Led to Colorado BLOWING Their First 3rd Period Lead in Game 2 vs Vegas | Film Room The Colorado Avalanche blew their first third-period lead of the season in a brutal 3-1 Game 2 loss to the Vegas Golden Knights, falling behind 2-0 in the Western Conference Final after entering the night 45-0-0 when leading after two periods. In this Avalanche Film Room, we break down the failed clears, bad transition defense, and late-game execution mistakes that opened the door for Jack Eichel and Ivan Barbashev to swing the game in a 2:07 span. Watch the full Colorado Avalanche vs. Vegas Golden Knights breakdown to see how Colorado’s third-period collapse happened, why Vegas capitalized, and what the Avs must clean up before Game 3 in Las Vegas.

videos.title: The Top Announcements From Google I/O
videos.summary_source_text:
The Top Announcements From Google I/O I had the opportunity to attend Google I/O this past week and speak directly with the Google DeepMind team about their latest releases. There were a bajillion announcements, so here's only what matters most:

▪️ Gemini 3.5 Flash: it's the first release in the new Gemini 3.5 family of models. It is designed to be a faster, more cost-effective option and is available now, with the full-fledged Gemini 3.5 Pro scheduled to launch later.

▪️ Gemini Omni: a new multimodal model focused on content editing and creation (they're calling it the "Nano Banana of video"). Right now it accepts video inputs with audio and image capabilities coming soon. 

▪️ Gemini Spark: Google's version of OpenClaw or Hermes. It's a 24/7 autonomous AI agent, but unlike the open-source options that require local computing power, Spark runs entirely on Google’s servers. 

Save this video so you remember to give one or all of these a try!

▪️ Gemini 3.5 Flash: it's the first release in the new Gemini 3.5 family of models. It is designed to be a faster, more cost-effective option and is available now, with the full-fledged Gemini 3.5 Pro scheduled to launch later.

▪️ Gemini Omni: a new multimodal model focused on content editing and creation (they're calling it the "Nano Banana of video"). Right now it accepts video inputs with audio and image capabilities coming soon. 

▪️ Gemini Spark: Google's version of OpenClaw or Hermes. It's a 24/7 autonomous AI agent, but unlike the open-source options that require local computing power, Spark runs entirely on Google’s servers. 

Save this video so you remember to give one or all of these a try!

#GoogleIO #AI #gemini #ainews #aiagents

There were a bajillion announcements, so here's only what matters most: ▪️ Gemini 3.5 Flash: it's the first release in the new Gemini 3.5 family of models.

videos.title: Greek Yogurt or Cottage Cheese?  One Keeps You Fuller and Helps You Sleep Better | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
Greek Yogurt or Cottage Cheese?  One Keeps You Fuller and Helps You Sleep Better | Dr. Mandell If you’re constantly hungry at night, craving snacks before bed, waking up hungry during the night, struggling with belly fat, poor sleep, or feeling exhausted the next morning, what you eat before bed may matter a lot more than you think. In this video, we break down the real physiological differences between Greek yogurt and cottage cheese, how these high protein foods affect fullness, blood sugar stability, cravings, muscle recovery, metabolism, gut health, and sleep quality, and why one may help keep you fuller longer overnight. Learn how slower digesting casein protein works, why probiotics and the gut microbiome matter, the difference between plain and flavored versions, low fat vs full fat options, the best time to eat them before bed, and why the wrong nighttime snack can spike blood sugar and leave you feeling worse the next morning. Food is more than calories, it’s information constantly communicating with your hormones, metabolism, hunger signals, recovery, and sleep. Once you understand that, you start making very different choices before bed.

videos.title: Why scooping and slicing ruin compression #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Why scooping and slicing ruin compression #golfswing #golftips Over-the-top swings and early release lead to scooping, slices, and a lack of compression. The pump drill trains the correct sequence by letting you feel lag, rotation, and proper delivery without forcing positions. Two controlled pumps to rehearse the motion, then swing through on the third to produce cleaner contact and more consistent ball flight.
If scooping, slicing, or weak contact is holding your game back, head to the link in our bio. Our coaching plans help you diagnose the root cause and build compression that holds up on the course.

videos.title: Round 3 Highlights | 2026 Soudal Open
videos.summary_source_text:
Round 3 Highlights | 2026 Soudal Open Highlights from round three of the 2026 Soudal Open at Rinkven International Golf Club in Belgium.

Saturday delivered plenty of drama, with huge eagles, hole-outs and low scoring across the course.

Zander Lombard remains at the top of the leaderboard at 18-under heading into the final round. MJ Daffue carded an impressive 6-under round to move into second and firmly into contention for Sunday. Earlier in the day, Nathan Kimsey produced a standout round of 8-under to climb the leaderboard. It’s all to play for tomorrow.

► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

After a break for the US PGA Championship last week, the European Swing resumes with the second of six events across the continent and the first of five consecutive national opens on the DP World Tour schedule as the Tour returns to Belgium for the Soudal Open. While this event can trace its roots back well over 100 years, this week sees the 20th time it has been part of the DP World Tour schedule. First played in 1910 and won by 1907 Open champion Arnaud Massy, it would be played every year until 1958 barring breaks for the two World Wars. Local star Thomas Detry is likely to be the headline act this week as he, almost unbelievably, searches for his first DP World Tour win after five runner-up finishes.

Welcome to the Official YouTube channel of the DP World Tour. Every week you can find extended tournament highlights and individual player highlights from the likes of Rory McIlroy, Justin Rose and Tommy Fleetwood. This is also the home of the 14 Club Challenge, Little Interviews, Fastest Hole and many more challenges, pranks and world record attempts featuring the biggest golfers in the world. 

► WEBSITE: http://www.europeantour.com
► FACEBOOK: https://www.facebook.com/DPWorldTour
► TWITTER https://twitter.com/DPWorldTour

videos.title: Elon Musk Just Declared War on Microsoft (Macrohard Explained)
videos.summary_source_text:
Elon Musk Just Declared War on Microsoft (Macrohard Explained) Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Elon Musk's Macrohard might be the most misunderstood AI project of 2026 
— a company designed to run entirely on AI agents, with no human 
developers and no human users. In this deep dive, I break down what 
Macrohard actually is, how Grok and Digital Optimus work together, and 
whether it's a real threat to Microsoft or just another Musk moonshot.

From the August 2025 trademark filing to the Memphis data center tour 
in April 2026, here's everything you need to know about the AI company 
that wants to replace Microsoft.

🔔 Subscribe for more AI deep dives: @BitBiasedAI 
👍 Drop a like if this helped you understand Macrohard

⏱️ CHAPTERS
00:00 Intro — Why Macrohard Matters
01:18 What is Macrohard?
02:21 Origin & History
04:10 How Does It Work? (Architecture)
05:58 Core Capabilities
07:22 Internal Use Cases (SpaceX & Tesla)
08:33 Strengths
09:35 Weaknesses & Challenges
11:17 Privacy & Legal Concerns
12:12 Availability & Pricing
13:00 Macrohard vs Microsoft (Comparison)
14:21 Market Impact & Scenarios
15:11 Adoption Barriers & Uncertainties

🎥 RELATED VIDEOS
https://youtu.be/RspKXuNi_iE
https://youtu.be/EZjS0ARK3Wg
https://youtu.be/akdRAquseP4

📌 KEY TAKEAWAYS
- Macrohard = software company minus the humans
- Grok is the "brain" (System 2), Digital Optimus is the "hands" (System 1)
- Runs on Tesla AI4 chips (~$650 each) + Nvidia GPUs in Memphis
- Joint Tesla–xAI project, now under SpaceXAI division
- No public release timeline — likely 2026/2027 internal beta
- Real infrastructure exists, but no polished product yet

💬 LET'S DISCUSS
Would you let an AI agent touch your company's systems? 
Is Macrohard the future or just another Musk moonshot?
Drop your take in the comments — I read them all.

videos.title: Pengar är inte lösningen, pengar är en förstärkare
videos.summary_source_text:
Pengar är inte lösningen, pengar är en förstärkare Det tog mig 20 år att inse det. Som student trodde jag att livet skulle bli bra vid 20 000 kr på kontot. Sen blev det 50 000, hundratusen, en miljon — och varje gång jag närmade mig flyttade jag bara fram målflaggan.

Min kollega Moa satte ord på det: pengar löser inget i sig, de förstärker bara den du redan är. Är du otrygg blir du mer otrygg av en miljon, för då oroar du dig för att förlora den. Är du generös och trygg så förstärks det istället.

Mer om sparande och ekonomisk trygghet finns på rikatillsammans.se och i podden RikaTillsammans.

Vad är ditt eget belopp som hela tiden flyttar sig? Skriv en kommentar.

videos.title: The Look-Feel Paradox
videos.summary_source_text:
The Look-Feel Paradox The crossover has even been called a “look–feel paradox”: it looks like your leg is crossing over, but it should actually feel like you’re crossing under.

In this breakdown, we’ll use a Braden Point clip to show exactly what that means. At the end of the move, his back foot is clearly in front, hence the name crossover. But if we rewind, you’ll see the real secret: instead of dragging his back leg across the midline, his front foot works under his body, and the back foot simply steps forward.

That’s why it looks like a crossover… but it feels like something totally different.

👉 Want the full breakdowns, advanced drills, and step-by-step progressions?

Join the Train 2.0+ Membership and take your mechanics to the next level with 10+ NHLers learning the education behind becoming a better hockey player. videos.summary_source_text:
Why hip sway ruins backswing control #golfswing #golftips A backswing that sways laterally instead of turning makes it difficult to control pressure and return the club consistently. Without feedback, many golfers don’t realise it’s happening. Using a simple visual reference helps you stay centred, improve lower body stability, and make your swing far more repeatable.

videos.title: The Last Chipping Lesson You'll Ever Need - 3 Simple Tips
videos.summary_source_text:
The Last Chipping Lesson You'll Ever Need - 3 Simple Tips If you've been struggling with your chip shots — thinning it, fatting it, or throwing in the occasional shank — there's a very good reason nothing you've tried has fixed it consistently. You've been using the wrong pattern. And in this chipping lesson I want to show you the exact pattern the best players use every single time around the green.

Here's something worth knowing before we start. Data from Shot Scope tells us that improving your long game by 10% saves you just 0.02 shots per round. Barely noticeable. But improve your short game inside 50 yards and you save an average of 4.9 shots. Every single round. So if there's one area of your golf that deserves your attention — this is it.

The pattern the best golfers use might surprise you. They start with an open face — even on a low chip shot. And then they square it and deloft through impact. That's the opposite of what most struggling chippers do. Most golfers try to hold the loft on or add loft through impact. That's exactly what creates the thins, the fats and the shanks. Once you understand this pattern and feel it working, your chipping becomes so much more consistent that this really could be the last chipping lesson you'll ever need.
⬇️ FREE PRACTICE GUIDE — Everything from this chipping lesson in one free download. Pinned to the top comment below.

What you'll learn in this chipping lesson:
▶ The one chipping pattern the best players use for every chip shot around the green ▶ Why starting with an open face makes your chipping more consistent — not less ▶ How to stop thinning and fatting chip shots with one simple pattern change ▶ The lead wrist and trail wrist positions that create perfect chip shot contact ▶ How to play high and low chip shots with exactly the same pattern ▶ Why the 60 degree wedge is the most underused club in most amateur golfers' bags ▶ How this short game pattern works for every shot inside 50 yards

⏱️ CHAPTERS
0:00 — The chipping pattern the best players use every time 0:41 — Why your short game is costing you almost 5 shots a round 1:01 — What the best players actually do around the green 1:25 — The open face secret — and why it works 2:14 — Why most golfers thin, fat and shank chip shots 2:33 — How to develop the correct chipping pattern 3:03 — Alex's story: why open face chipping feels counterintuitive 4:04 — The lead wrist and trail wrist pattern explained 5:23 — The stake drill for consistent chip shot contact 6:18 — How to play a higher chip shot with the same pattern 8:41 — Building the complete chipping pattern for every shot

I will show you the golf swing slow motion so that you can see what you need to do to improve.

#golfchipping  #ShortGame #ChippingTips If you've been struggling with your chip shots — thinning it, fatting it, or throwing in the occasional shank — there's a very good reason nothing you've tried has fixed it consistently. You've been using the wrong pattern. And in this chipping lesson I want to show you the exact pattern the best players use every single time around the green.

Here's something worth knowing before we start. Data from Shot Scope tells us that improving your long game by 10% saves you just 0.02 shots per round. Barely noticeable. But improve your short game inside 50 yards and you save an average of 4.9 shots. Every single round. So if there's one area of your golf that deserves your attention — this is it.

The pattern the best golfers use might surprise you. They start with an open face — even on a low chip shot. And then they square it and deloft through impact. That's the opposite of what most struggling chippers do. Most golfers try to hold the loft on or add loft through impact. That's exactly what creates the thins, the fats and the shanks. Once you understand this pattern and feel it working, your chipping becomes so much more consistent that this really could be the last chipping lesson you'll ever need.

videos.title: The #1 Missing Factor in Hair Loss
videos.summary_source_text:
The #1 Missing Factor in Hair Loss If you’re dealing with pattern hair loss, a receding hairline, or thinning hair, this is for you. Discover how to stop hair loss naturally and support healthy hair regrowth by addressing the true underlying causes of hair loss. 

🌟 10 biological signals control how you feel every day, but only 1 matters most for YOUR body. Take the free 2-minute quiz to find out: https://drbrg.co/4drgopd

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

0:00 Introduction: Pattern hair loss
0:37 Hair follicle stem cells
1:15 Hair loss causes
1:49 DHT hair loss 
3:27 Can I take a natural DHT blocker?
5:28 How to regrow hair naturally
5:53 DHT benefits
6:50 Microneedling for hair loss
8:02 Topical melatonin for hair growth
8:30 Hair growth tips and natural hair loss remedies 
9:13 Onion juice for hair regrowth
9:51 Stress and hair loss

Keep watching to learn more about the best ways to support natural hair regrowth:
▶️ https://youtu.be/BlnOEpsPt1A
▶️ https://youtu.be/6CCI1vz1bAc
▶️ https://youtu.be/DEiybCei-ls

Most hair-loss remedies won’t work because of scar tissue on the scalp. This physical barrier can prevent healthy hair growth.

If you’re experiencing hair loss, your hair follicles aren't actually dead; they’re dormant. Even people who are completely bald still have living stem cells within the hair follicles.

Scar tissue on the scalp is often caused by inflammation. Inflammation can lead to calcification and reduced blood flow to the scalp, preventing many hair loss remedies from working effectively.

You may have heard that DHT, a powerful form of testosterone, causes pattern hair loss. There is usually a deeper root cause behind DHT-related hair loss: insulin resistance.

Hair follicles depend on glucose for fuel. If you’re insulin-resistant, hair follicles may not get the energy they need to support healthy hair growth.

Simply taking a DHT blocker without addressing insulin resistance may not produce significant results. Improving insulin resistance is a more effective strategy for supporting natural hair regrowth, and a low-carb diet is one of the best ways to combat it.

Scalp microneedling has been shown to help break up scar tissue and improve the penetration of topical hair loss remedies. This helps natural remedies, such as topical melatonin, work more effectively.

DATA:
https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC11499218/

https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC4017725/
https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/17092697/
https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC6126931/
https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC11318540/

videos.summary_source_text:
EVERY golfer should be fitted for this club 👀 Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

It’s time for the ultimate Porsche 911 Turbo showdown! 

We’ve got our hands on every generation of 911 Turbo, and we’ll be putting them head-to-head over the quarter-mile to see which is the greatest (and quickest!) of all-time. So let’s take a look at the contenders… 

911 930 Turbo: 3.3-litre Turbo Flat-6, 300hp & 412Nm, 1310kg

911 964 Turbo S: 3.3-litre Turbo Flat 6, 381hp & 490Nm, 1290kg

911 993 Turbo: 3.6-litre Twin-turbo Flat 6, 408hp & 540Nm, 1500kg

911 996 Turbo S: 3.6-litre Twin-turbo Flat 6, 420hp & 560Nm, 1540kg

911 997 Turbo: 3.6-litre Twin-turbo Flat 6, 480hp & 680Nm, 1585kg

992.2 Turbo S: 3.6-litre Twin-turbo Flat 6 Hybrid, 711hp & 800Nm, 1740kg

So will the all-new 992.2 walk it? Or could one of the older generations snatch the win? There’s only one way to find out… LET’S RACE!

videos.title: UK | 22nd May, Friday - Ep.10 - How AI Will Redefine Trading & Financial Systems
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 22nd May, Friday - Ep.10 - How AI Will Redefine Trading & Financial Systems Welcome to Episode 10 of RIFT Before You Quit — one of the most important and forward-thinking sessions in the entire series.

In this episode, we go far beyond trading charts and market psychology. We explore the future of financial infrastructure itself — how AI, automation, decentralized systems, and intelligent execution environments are reshaping the entire financial world.

This is not hype.
This is not science fiction.
This is the direction global finance is already moving toward.

As financial systems evolve, the winners of the next decade will not simply be the fastest traders or the loudest influencers — they will be the people and systems with the strongest infrastructure, smartest execution, and most scalable technology.

videos.title: Avalanche Drop Both Games At Home and Head to Vegas With Their Season in the Balance
videos.summary_source_text:
Avalanche Drop Both Games At Home and Head to Vegas With Their Season in the Balance Colorado Avalanche drop both home games as Vegas Golden Knights seize momentum—can Nathan MacKinnon and crew rally with their season on the line?

Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson dissect the Avalanche's frustrating loss, questioning the team's execution and highlighting blocked shots, power play struggles, and the absence of Cale Makar. Insights focus on Scott Wedgewood's key saves, Ross Colton's lone bright moment, and the need for Brock Nelson, Valeri Nichushkin, and Martin Necas to step up. Discussion covers high-danger scoring chances, Vegas’s defensive anticipation, and the inconsistent officiating that haunted both teams.

Will a potential Cale Makar return ignite Colorado in Vegas? Explore how momentum, missed opportunities, and crucial lineup changes could decide the Avalanche’s playoff fate.

videos.title: Hindi | 22nd May, Friday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi | 22nd May, Friday - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

videos.title: Cover the Lead Side Like This  #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Cover the Lead Side Like This  #golfswing #golftips To compress the ball well, your body needs to be preparing for impact earlier than most golfers realize. By allowing the lead shoulder to cover the lead leg and moving cohesively—shifting and turning together—you arrive at the impact line sooner and with more control. Using an alignment stick against the lead hip gives a clear visual of where impact should be and how early you can get there. This creates a smoother transition and much more consistent contact.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. To compress the ball well, your body needs to be preparing for impact earlier than most golfers realize. By allowing the lead shoulder to cover the lead leg and moving cohesively—shifting and turning together—you arrive at the impact line sooner and with more control. Using an alignment stick against the lead hip gives a clear visual of where impact should be and how early you can get there. This creates a smoother transition and much more consistent contact.

videos.title: PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 2 | THE CJ CUP | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 2 | THE CJ CUP | 2026 Check out the best shots of the day from Round 2 of the 2026 THE CJ CUP Byron Nelson, featuring Si Woo Kim, Sungjae Im, Jordan Spieth, and Scottie Scheffler, among others.

The PGA TOUR returns to Texas for the 2026 THE CJ CUP Byron Nelson at TPC Craig Ranch, with hometown hero and defending champion Scottie Scheffler leading the field after his historic eight-shot victory last year. Dallas natives Jordan Spieth and Si Woo Kim also return to a redesigned TPC Craig Ranch, while major champion Brooks Koepka headlines another strong Texas field alongside rising local star Pierceson Coody. This year marks the debut of a renovated course overseen by World Golf Hall of Famer Lanny Wadkins, with longer holes, rebuilt greens and repositioned bunkers set to provide a tougher test. The tournament also continues its Mental Health Awareness Month initiatives, highlighted by the annual “Green Out” celebration and charitable efforts surrounding the iconic par-3 17th hole, “The Ranch.” With FedExCup points, Signature Event positioning and momentum heading into the PGA Championship all on the line, another exciting week awaits in Texas.

videos.title: Ultimate Galaxy S Speed Test! (Lab Tested)
videos.summary_source_text:
Ultimate Galaxy S Speed Test! (Lab Tested) Sponsored by Zapier! Zapier MCP levels you up, connecting you directly to apps to automate your workflow. Start building with Zapier MCP and use my template to build today: https://bit.ly/4umqpKj  #ZapierPartner

Speed test between the last six generations of the Galaxy S Ultra phones using robots and a controlled environment to test them across different apps and features.

TEST NOTES:

- The devices were either purchased new or renewed by Samsung with original OEM parts and new batteries.
- The S21 Ultra was the only one purchased used; however, it had a recent battery replacement and is still at 100% health.
- Samsung's Renewed website only offered the S23 Ultra in an 8GB configuration, so it created a spec difference. However, it didn't end up playing a major role in this test.
- Screens were calibrated to 200 nits with auto brightness turned off.
- Devices are within an equal distance of a WiFi point.
- Tested in a temperature-controlled environment.
- Footage sped up at different parts for a better viewing experience.
- The S21 Ultra is not eligible for the One UI 8 / Android 16 update, so it was tested on One UI 7 / Android 15 — the latest software it supports.

Software versions at the time of testing:

- Galaxy S21 Ultra: One UI 7, Android 15
- Galaxy S22 Ultra: One UI 8, Android 16
- Galaxy S23 Ultra: One UI 8, Android 16
- Galaxy S24 Ultra: One UI 8, Android 16
- Galaxy S25 Ultra: One UI 8, Android 16
- Galaxy S26 Ultra: One UI 8.5, Android 16

videos.title: AI Just Crossed The Line We Were Afraid Of: Continual Harness
videos.summary_source_text:
AI Just Crossed The Line We Were Afraid Of: Continual Harness Princeton researchers just revealed Continual Harness, a self-improving AI system that learns while it is already running. It can change its own instructions, build helper agents, create reusable tools, store memories, fix mistakes, and keep improving without a reset button. What started as an AI playing Pokémon may point to something much bigger: AI agents that can adapt without humans constantly stepping in.

📩 Brand Deals & Partnerships: collabs@nouralabs.com
✉ General Inquiries: airevolutionofficial@gmail.com
🚀 New Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@space.revolution

📌 What You’ll See:
Princeton paper on Continual Harness and self-improving AI agents
SOURCE: https://arxiv.org/html/2605.09998v1
Continual Harness project page explaining reset-free self-improvement
SOURCE: https://sethkarten.ai/continual-harness/
Hugging Face paper summary on Pokémon Red and Emerald results
SOURCE: https://huggingface.co/papers/2605.09998
Official GitHub repository for Continual Harness
SOURCE: https://github.com/sethkarten/continual-harness
Gemini Plays Pokémon case study and agent harness background
SOURCE: https://www.dbreunig.com/2025/06/17/an-agentic-case-study-playing-pok%C3%A9mon-with-gemini.html

🚨 Why It Matters
This is bigger than an AI playing a game. Continual Harness shows an AI agent improving itself during a live task, building its own tools, refining its own strategy, and carrying knowledge forward instead of starting over. The same idea could matter for robots, computer agents, autonomous assistants, and any AI system that needs to learn from the real world while it is already operating.

videos.title: How To Deke Under The Defender’s Stick
videos.summary_source_text:
How To Deke Under The Defender’s Stick The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: How To Get Defenders To Expose Themselves
videos.summary_source_text:
How To Get Defenders To Expose Themselves Troy Terry has mastered two key strategies for attacking triangles and exposing defenders and I uncovered them by accident when Pavel Barber and I put GoPros on our heads during 3-on-3s.

What I realized re-watching that footage: there's way more time on the puck than I thought, if you pay attention to where defenders' sticks are positioned. And if you bait your opponent correctly, you can actually use their stick momentum against them. That's when I started dissecting players like Crosby, I found Troy Terry has perfected this dangle by design movement.

videos.title: Two Game 1 Stunners, Makar Concerns and the Summer of Offer Sheets? | DFO Rundown
videos.summary_source_text:
Two Game 1 Stunners, Makar Concerns and the Summer of Offer Sheets? | DFO Rundown *Recorded BEFORE the Cale Makar News* * He WILL be OUT for Game 2*

The Montreal Canadiens stunned the Carolina Hurricanes in Game 1 of the Eastern Conference Final and suddenly the pressure is on Carolina. Jason Gregor and Mike Rupp break down how Montreal exposed the Hurricanes’ aggressive style, why Cole Caufield and Ivan Demidov taking over offensively changes the series, and whether the Habs are becoming a legitimate Stanley Cup threat.

Plus, the Vegas Golden Knights steal Game 1 against the Colorado Avalanche. The guys discuss the impact of Cale Makar’s injury concern, Colorado’s looming goalie decision, and why Pavel Dorofeyev continues to be one of the NHL’s most underrated scorers.

Also discussed:

Freddie Andersen & Colorado’s goaltending questions
Why Montreal’s confidence keeps growing
Vegas capitalizing on Avalanche mistakes
The Memorial Cup & the changing CHL/NCAA landscape
Macklin Celebrini’s next contract projection
NHL offseason goalie carousel rumors

videos.title: Jeff Marek Goes Inside the Kelowna Rockets Ahead of the Memorial Cup | Beyond the Crest (EP 5)
videos.summary_source_text:
Jeff Marek Goes Inside the Kelowna Rockets Ahead of the Memorial Cup | Beyond the Crest (EP 5) Jeff Marek heads to Kelowna for another episode of Beyond the Crest as he explores the culture, identity, and people behind one of junior hockey’s most storied organizations — the Kelowna Rockets. Marek sits down with top prospect Tij Iginla, Head Coach Derrick Martin, Assistant Coach Josh Gorges, goaltender Harrison Boettiger, Owner Bruce Hamilton, and Vojtech Cihar as they share stories about development, leadership, the pressure of reaching the next level, and what makes Kelowna such a unique hockey market. Beyond the rink, the episode also shines a light on the fans, billet families, and community members who help shape the Rockets experience and create an environment that feels bigger than hockey itself. With the Memorial Cup on the horizon and a rich history behind the organization, this episode dives into what makes the Rockets program and the city of Kelowna such a special place in the hockey world.

#BeyondTheCrest #KelownaRockets #MemorialCup #WHL #CHL #TijIginla #JeffMarek #JuniorHockey #Hockey

videos.title: The Buttcrack Drill to Get Rid Of Your Sway  #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
The Buttcrack Drill to Get Rid Of Your Sway  #golfswing #golftips Place an alignment stick in between your butt cheeks - yes, you read that right. Right between your butt cheeks! This silly drill is a super simple way to ensure that you’re turning properly in your backswing instead of swaying or shifting. If you lose the alignment stick and move away from it, you’re moving wrong! 
If this is something you struggle with, you don’t need more tips, you need the right plan. We’ve created coaching plans designed to fix specific problems faster.

videos.title: Why You Feel Exhausted After Lunch | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
Why You Feel Exhausted After Lunch | Dr. Mandell Most people eat lunch and feel worse afterward, sleepy, bloated, mentally foggy, craving sugar, and reaching for caffeine just to get through the rest of the day. But what if your lunch could do the exact opposite? In this video, I show you the real lunch I just finished eating and explain how every bite of food sends powerful signals to your body that influence inflammation, blood sugar, energy, cravings, brain function, gut health, metabolism, circulation, and even aging. Learn why healthy fats, omega 3s, fiber, antioxidants, phytonutrients, and whole foods affect your hormones and energy differently than ultra processed foods, refined starches, fried foods, and sugary meals. This is not about dieting or perfection, it’s about understanding how food affects your body on a deeper physiological level so you can start making choices that support long term health, stable energy, better focus, and reduced inflammation naturally.

*********************************

Please share this video with your friends and family.  Wishing you and your family many Blessings!  ❤️😊🙏 Dr M

videos.title: Canadiens Dominate Game 1 and Makar Ruled Out for Game 2 ft. David Pagnotta & PJ Stock | The Sheet
videos.summary_source_text:
Canadiens Dominate Game 1 and Makar Ruled Out for Game 2 ft. David Pagnotta & PJ Stock | The Sheet Today's episode of The Sheet with Jeff Marek dives into a wild start to the Conference Finals as David Pagnotta and PJ Stock join the show to break down the Montreal Canadiens stunning the Carolina Hurricanes with a dominant Game 1 performance in Raleigh. After jumping all over Carolina early and taking control from the opening frame, the crew looks at what fueled Montreal’s explosive start, whether the Hurricanes showed signs of rust after their lengthy layoff, and if the Canadiens are beginning to feel like a true Stanley Cup threat. They also discuss a major storyline in the Western Conference with Cale Makar being ruled out for Game 2 as the Colorado Avalanche prepare for another battle with the Vegas Golden Knights, and what his absence means for the series moving forward. Plus, Jeff, David, and PJ zoom out for a full Conference Finals overview, discussing the biggest storylines across both matchups while also getting into the latest buzz surrounding NHL coaching searches and front-office movement around the league.

Today's episode of The Sheet with Jeff Marek dives into a wild start to the Conference Finals as David Pagnotta and PJ Stock join the show to break down the Montreal Canadiens stunning the Carolina Hurricanes with a dominant Game 1 performance in Raleigh. After jumping all over Carolina early and taking control from the opening frame, the crew looks at what fueled Montreal’s explosive start, whether the Hurricanes showed signs of rust after their lengthy layoff, and if the Canadiens are beginning to feel like a true Stanley Cup threat. They also discuss a major storyline in the Western Conference with Cale Makar being ruled out for Game 2 as the Colorado Avalanche prepare for another battle with the Vegas Golden Knights, and what his absence means for the series moving forward. Plus, Jeff, David, and PJ zoom out for a full Conference Finals overview, discussing the biggest storylines across both matchups while also getting into the latest buzz surrounding NHL coaching searches and front-office movement around the league.

videos.title: Hole-in-one to tie the LEAD from Sungjae Im! | THE CJ CUP | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
Hole-in-one to tie the LEAD from Sungjae Im! | THE CJ CUP | 2026 Sungjae Im makes an ace from 224 yards out on the par-3 7th hole in for a share of the lead in Round 2 at THE CJ CUP 2026! Presented by @trugreen. 

The PGA TOUR returns to Texas for the 2026 THE CJ CUP Byron Nelson at TPC Craig Ranch, with hometown hero and defending champion Scottie Scheffler leading the field after his historic eight-shot victory last year. Dallas natives Jordan Spieth and Si Woo Kim also return to a redesigned TPC Craig Ranch, while major champion Brooks Koepka headlines another strong Texas field alongside rising local star Pierceson Coody. This year marks the debut of a renovated course overseen by World Golf Hall of Famer Lanny Wadkins, with longer holes, rebuilt greens and repositioned bunkers set to provide a tougher test. The tournament also continues its Mental Health Awareness Month initiatives, highlighted by the annual “Green Out” celebration and charitable efforts surrounding the iconic par-3 17th hole, “The Ranch.” With FedExCup points, Signature Event positioning and momentum heading into the PGA Championship all on the line, another exciting week awaits in Texas.

videos.title: Gemini 3.5 Flash Is Getting ROASTED (And Nobody's Talking About the Best Thing They Shipped)
videos.summary_source_text:
Gemini 3.5 Flash Is Getting ROASTED (And Nobody's Talking About the Best Thing They Shipped) Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Google I/O 2026 just dropped a wave of AI announcements — Gemini 3.5 Flash, Gemini Omni, Antigravity 2.0, Spark, Universal Cart, AI eyewear, and more. But the model Google hyped hardest is the LEAST loved by developers, and the announcement nobody's talking about might be the best thing they shipped all year.

In this breakdown, I cut through the keynote spin and walk you through every major announcement — what's working today, what's still vaporware, and what to actually try this week. Real developer reactions, real benchmarks, real verdicts.

🔥 TIMESTAMPS
00:00 The model Google hyped is getting ROASTED
01:03 What I/O 2026 was really about: agents everywhere
01:40 Gemini 3.5 Flash — specs, benchmarks, and the cost problem
04:37 Gemini Omni — the announcement nobody's talking about
06:31 Google Antigravity 2.0 — agent orchestration done right
08:42 Gemini Spark — the most ambitious (and risky) bet
10:43 Gemini app facelift, Daily Brief, and Workspace updates
12:31 Universal Cart, AI eyewear, and AI Mode in Search
13:52 What the experts (and Sam Altman) are saying
15:04 Final verdict: what to use, what to skip

📌 KEY TAKEAWAYS
- Gemini 3.5 Flash: ~5.5x more expensive than the previous Flash for marginal — sometimes negative — quality gains. 60% negative community reaction.
- Gemini Omni: The surprise winner. Conversational video editing that actually works. SynthID watermarked.
- Antigravity 2.0: Solid upgrade. Voice commands, multi-agent orchestration, /grill-me command. $100/mo AI Ultra plan raises eyebrows.
- Gemini Spark: Always-on personal agent with full Gmail/Docs/Drive/Calendar access. Powerful — and a massive trust ask.
- Daily Brief, Universal Cart, AI Mode in Search: Mixed bag. Some ship-ready, some still rolling out.

💬 I want to hear from you:
→ Team Flash, or already reverting to an older model?
→ Would you actually let an AI read all your emails?
→ Which IDE are you using right now — Cursor, Antigravity, Claude Code, something else?

Drop your honest take in the comments.

🔔 SUBSCRIBE for hands-on tests of every tool in this video — real workflows, real bugs, real verdicts.

videos.title: Master These 6 AI Skills Before It's Too Late
videos.summary_source_text:
Master These 6 AI Skills Before It's Too Late *Top 100 AI Tools for Business:* https://clickhubspot.com/hswc

I go step by step to show how I use AI skills in 2026 to save time, build faster, and get better results.

I cover the top AI skills I think matter most right now. I start with prompt engineering, so you can talk to AI the right way and get clearer answers from ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude.

Then I show how I use AI for deep research with tools like NotebookLM. This helps me turn lots of notes, websites, videos, and files into useful research without wasting hours.

I also walk through AI content creation. I show how AI can help make images, videos, voiceovers, ads, and other content with simple prompts. I use tools like ChatGPT, Gemini, Veo, and Google Flow to show how this works.

I also explain AI agents and how they can do full jobs for you, not just answer questions. Then I show vibe coding with tools like Lovable and Claude Code, where you can build websites, apps, and AI tools without writing code.

Last, I talk about AI orchestration. This is how I connect different AI tools into one simple workflow, so the work gets done faster from start to finish.

This video is for anyone who wants to use AI tools for business, content, research, coding, marketing, and daily work in 2026. *Top 100 AI Tools for Business:* https://clickhubspot.com/hswc

videos.title: Round 2 Highlights | 2026 Soudal Open
videos.summary_source_text:
Round 2 Highlights | 2026 Soudal Open All the best bits from round two of the 2026 Soudal Open at Rinkven International Golf Club in Belgium.

Round two also marked an emotional farewell to Nicolas Colsaerts as he played the final tournament of his professional career. The Belgian signed off in style with an eagle and three consecutive birdies on the front nine. There were plenty of low scores throughout the day, with Tom Vaillant, Andrew ‘Beef’ Johnston, David Ravetto and Davis Bryant all carding brilliant rounds of 7-under.

► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

After a break for the US PGA Championship last week, the European Swing resumes with the second of six events across the continent and the first of five consecutive national opens on the DP World Tour schedule as the Tour returns to Belgium for the Soudal Open. While this event can trace its roots back well over 100 years, this week sees the 20th time it has been part of the DP World Tour schedule. First played in 1910 and won by 1907 Open champion Arnaud Massy, it would be played every year until 1958 barring breaks for the two World Wars. Local star Thomas Detry is likely to be the headline act this week as he, almost unbelievably, searches for his first DP World Tour win after five runner-up finishes.

Welcome to the Official YouTube channel of the DP World Tour. Every week you can find extended tournament highlights and individual player highlights from the likes of Rory McIlroy, Justin Rose and Tommy Fleetwood. This is also the home of the 14 Club Challenge, Little Interviews, Fastest Hole and many more challenges, pranks and world record attempts featuring the biggest golfers in the world.

videos.summary_source_text:
Canadiens Shock Hurricanes in Game 1 + Predators GM Search Continues | Daily Faceoff Live The Montreal Canadiens have officially stunned the hockey world. After a dominant Game 1 win over the Carolina Hurricanes, we break down how the Habs controlled the pace, frustrated Carolina, and suddenly flipped the pressure in the Eastern Conference Final. Can Montreal actually pull this off?

We also dive into the growing pressure on the Colorado Avalanche ahead of Game 2 against the Vegas Golden Knights. What adjustments does Colorado need to make immediately to avoid falling into a dangerous 0-2 hole? From defensive structure to secondary scoring, we cover the biggest keys for the Avs.

Plus, it’s time for our Nashville Predators offseason preview. With the Predators still searching for their next GM, what direction will the franchise take this summer? Will Nashville retool around its current core or consider bigger changes? We discuss the biggest questions facing the organization heading into a critical offseason.

videos.title: Så vet du när du har vunnit det ekonomiska spelet (4 %-regeln förklarad) #shorts
videos.summary_source_text:
Så vet du när du har vunnit det ekonomiska spelet (4 %-regeln förklarad) #shorts Sofia ställde frågan: när har man egentligen vunnit det ekonomiska spelet?Jag tänker att det finns två sätt att veta.


Det första är känslan av "tillräckligt" — att mer pengar inte väsentligt skulle förändra din vardag. På ekonomispråk: marginalnyttan av mer pengar går mot noll.

Det andra är matematiken. Logga in på minpension.se och kolla vad du får ut livsvarigt från 65 års ålder. Räkna ut gapet mot dina månadsutgifter, multiplicera med 12 och sedan med 30. Det är beloppet du behöver ha på ett ISK för att med ~90 % sannolikhet kunna täcka gapet i 30 år.

Exempel: går du back 5 000 kr/mån = 60 000 kr/år × 30 = 1,8 miljoner.

Bygger på William Bengens klassiska 4-procentsregel, justerad för svensk ISK-skatt (därför × 30 i stället för × 25).

📩 Vill du ha fler ekonomitips i organiserad form? Anmäl dig till vårt nyhetsbrev där 70 000+ läsare redan finns: https://rikatillsammans.se/nyhetsbrev

Exempel: går du back 5 000 kr/mån = 60 000 kr/år × 30 = 1,8 miljoner.

videos.title: What Processed Food Can Never Replicate
videos.summary_source_text:
What Processed Food Can Never Replicate Real food is far more complex than most people realize. A carrot grows surrounded by millions of bacteria in the soil, yet it naturally contains compounds that protect and preserve it. That is the difference between real food and manufactured food products. Nature built these foods with layers of nutrients and protective chemicals that science still does not fully understand.

videos.title: Anthropic Is Getting More Expensive
videos.summary_source_text:
Anthropic Is Getting More Expensive 🗓️ Save these dates:

Anthropic is making massive changes to Claude’s pricing. Here is exactly what is happening and when: 

- Weekly limits for Claude Code are increasing by 50% through July 13th. That means you can send significantly more prompts and generate more code before hitting the usage cap.

- BUT starting June 15th, using Claude outside of Claude Code (like OpenClaw or Hermes) means you get a set monthly credit, and once credits run out, you are billed at the expensive API rate. Some people are estimating a 100-200 credit will burn out in just a few HOURS of heavy work, making Claude Code way more expensive for many.

videos.title: Mastering the 60 Yard Shot
videos.summary_source_text:
Mastering the 60 Yard Shot 📍Keep the arms straight, that way the body works more aggressively to keep you going through the shot, and you're less armsy.

 📍Feel like you really take a shorter back swing and a more aggressive follow through to the finish. That's gonna keep you accelerating through the golf ball.

📍 Finally, if we can de-lo- loft this club, we're gonna hit some great low spinning or high spinning shots that launch really low, just like the pros. 📍Keep the arms straight, that way the body works more aggressively to keep you going through the shot, and you're less armsy.

 📍Feel like you really take a shorter back swing and a more aggressive follow through to the finish. That's gonna keep you accelerating through the golf ball.

📍 Finally, if we can de-lo- loft this club, we're gonna hit some great low spinning or high spinning shots that launch really low, just like the pros.
